changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS loan_type_name_idx_unique ON loan_type (lower(f_unaccent(jsonb->>'name')));

changeSet.author: folio
folio
changeSet.comment: Create instance_date_type table and inline base DDL dependencies

changeSet.author: folio
folio
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO instance_date_type (id, jsonb) VALUES ('42dac21e-3c81-4cb1-9f16-9e50c81bacc4', '{"id":"42dac21e-3c81-4cb1-9f16-9e50c81bacc4","name":"Continuing resource ceased publication","code":"d","displayFormat":{"delimiter":"-","keepDelimiter":true},"source":"folio"}'), ('0750f52b-3bfc-458d-9307-e9afc8bcdffa', '{"id":"0750f52b-3bfc-458d-9307-e9afc8bcdffa","name":"Continuing resource currently published","code":"c","displayFormat":{"delimiter":"-","keepDelimiter":true},"source":"folio"}'), ('5a1a1adb-de71-45e6-ba94-1c0838969f04', '{"id":"5a1a1adb-de71-45e6-ba94-1c0838969f04","name":"Continuing resource status unknown","code":"u","displayFormat":{"delimiter":"-","keepDelimiter":true},"source":"folio"}'), ('5f84208a-0aa6-4694-a58f-5310b654f012', '{"id":"5f84208a-0aa6-4694-a58f-5310b654f012","name":"Date of distribution/release/issue and production/recording session when different","code":"p","displayFormat":{"delimiter":",","keepDelimiter":false},"source":"folio"}'), ('e77bb7ed-2e53-4c62-8b06-5907b8934ba7', '{"id":"e77bb7ed-2e53-4c62-8b06-5907b8934ba7","name":"Dates unknown","code":"n","displayFormat":{"delimiter":",","keepDelimiter":false},"source":"folio"}'), ('9669a463-5971-42dc-9eee-046bbd678fb1', '{"id":"9669a463-5971-42dc-9eee-046bbd678fb1","name":"Detailed date","code":"e","displayFormat":{"delimiter":",","keepDelimiter":false},"source":"folio"}'), ('6de732c5-c29b-4a10-9db0-0729ca960f12', '{"id":"6de732c5-c29b-4a10-9db0-0729ca960f12","name":"Inclusive dates of collection","code":"i","displayFormat":{"delimiter":"-","keepDelimiter":true},"source":"folio"}'), ('8fa6d067-41ff-4362-96a0-96b16ddce267', '{"id":"8fa6d067-41ff-4362-96a0-96b16ddce267","name":"Multiple dates","code":"m","displayFormat":{"delimiter":",","keepDelimiter":false},"source":"folio"}'), ('6f8cd9a8-26ac-4df6-8709-62fe2c0d04f8', '{"id":"6f8cd9a8-26ac-4df6-8709-62fe2c0d04f8","name":"No attempt to code","code":"|","displayFormat":{"delimiter":",","keepDelimiter":false},"source":"folio"}'), ('77a09c3c-37bd-4ad3-aae4-9d86fc1b33d8', '{"id":"77a09c3c-37bd-4ad3-aae4-9d86fc1b33d8","name":"No dates given; B.C. date involved","code":"b","displayFormat":{"delimiter":",","keepDelimiter":false},"source":"folio"}'), ('3a4296bf-504b-451b-9355-5806f8d88253', '{"id":"3a4296bf-504b-451b-9355-5806f8d88253","name":"Publication date and copyright date","code":"t","displayFormat":{"delimiter":",","keepDelimiter":false},"source":"folio"}'), ('4afa7d3d-e6f5-4134-9ab5-32ad377d2432', '{"id":"4afa7d3d-e6f5-4134-9ab5-32ad377d2432","name":"Questionable date","code":"q","displayFormat":{"delimiter":",","keepDelimiter":false},"source":"folio"}'), ('ccc293d5-9e88-4222-ac04-d058351ddb7b', '{"id":"ccc293d5-9e88-4222-ac04-d058351ddb7b","name":"Range of years of bulk of collection","code":"k","displayFormat":{"delimiter":"-","keepDelimiter":true},"source":"folio"}'), ('47622598-61eb-4348-899a-1208275c3882', '{"id":"47622598-61eb-4348-899a-1208275c3882","name":"Reprint/reissue date and original date","code":"r","displayFormat":{"delimiter":",","keepDelimiter":false},"source":"folio"}'), ('24a506e8-2a92-4ecc-bd09-ff849321fd5a', '{"id":"24a506e8-2a92-4ecc-bd09-ff849321fd5a","name":"Single known date/probable date","code":"s","displayFormat":{"delimiter":",","keepDelimiter":false},"source":"folio"}') ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET jsonb=EXCLUDED.jsonb;

changeSet.author: folio
changeSet.comment: Create subject_type table and inline base DDL dependencies
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS subject_type_name_idx_unique ON subject_type (lower(f_unaccent(jsonb->>'name')));

changeSet.author: folio
folio
folio
changeSet.comment: Create subject_source table and inline base DDL dependencies
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS subject_source_name_idx_unique ON subject_source (lower(f_unaccent(jsonb->>'name')));
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS subject_source_code_idx_unique ON subject_source (lower(f_unaccent(jsonb->>'code')));

changeSet.author: folio
folio
folio
changeSet.comment: Create instance table and inline base DDL dependencies
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_source_idx ON instance (left(lower(jsonb->>'source'), 600));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_indexTitle_idx ON instance (left(lower(f_unaccent(jsonb->>'indexTitle')), 600));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_title_idx ON instance (left(lower(f_unaccent(jsonb->>'title')), 600));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_sourceUri_idx ON instance (left(lower(f_unaccent(jsonb->>'sourceUri')), 600));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_statisticalCodeIds_idx ON instance (left(lower(jsonb->>'statisticalCodeIds'), 600));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_staffSuppress_idx ON instance (left(lower(jsonb->>'staffSuppress'), 600));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_discoverySuppress_idx ON instance (left(lower(jsonb->>'discoverySuppress'), 600));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_metadata_updatedDate_idx ON instance (left(lower(jsonb->'metadata'->>'updatedDate'), 600));
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_hrid_idx_unique ON instance (lower(f_unaccent(jsonb->>'hrid')));
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_matchKey_idx_unique ON instance (lower(f_unaccent(jsonb->>'matchKey')));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_identifiers_idx_ft ON instance USING GIN (get_tsvector(f_unaccent(instance.jsonb->>'identifiers')));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_invalidIsbn_idx_ft ON instance USING GIN (get_tsvector(normalize_invalid_isbns(jsonb->'identifiers')));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_isbn_idx_ft ON instance USING GIN (get_tsvector(normalize_isbns(jsonb->'identifiers')));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_instance_complete_updated_date ON instance(complete_updated_date);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_deleted_idx ON instance ((jsonb ->> 'deleted'));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_discoverysuppress_source_idx ON instance (((jsonb ->> 'discoverySuppress'::text)), ((jsonb ->> 'source'::text)));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_creation_date_idx ON instance (creation_date);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_cataloged_date_idx ON instance (to_timestamp(jsonb->>'catalogedDate'));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_format_ids_idx ON instance USING gin ((jsonb -> 'instanceFormatIds') jsonb_path_ops);

changeSet.author: folio
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS idx_instance_complete_updated_date ON instance(complete_updated_date);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_deleted_idx ON instance ((jsonb ->> 'deleted'));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_discoverysuppress_source_idx ON instance (((jsonb ->> 'discoverySuppress'::text)), ((jsonb ->> 'source'::text)));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_creation_date_idx ON instance (creation_date);
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_cataloged_date_idx ON instance (to_timestamp(jsonb->>'catalogedDate'));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS instance_format_ids_idx ON instance USING gin ((jsonb -> 'instanceFormatIds') jsonb_path_ops);

changeSet.author: folio
folio
changeSet.comment: Create instance_source_marc table and inline base DDL dependencies

changeSet.author: folio
folio
changeSet.comment: Create ill_policy table and inline base DDL dependencies
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS ill_policy_name_idx_unique ON ill_policy (lower(f_unaccent(jsonb->>'name')));

changeSet.comment: Create call_number_type table and inline base DDL dependencies
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS call_number_type_name_idx_unique ON call_number_type (lower(f_unaccent(jsonb->>'name')));

changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS holdings_type_name_idx_unique ON holdings_type (lower(f_unaccent(jsonb->>'name')));

changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS holdings_note_type_name_idx_unique ON holdings_note_type (lower(f_unaccent(jsonb->>'name')));

changeSet.author: folio
folio
changeSet.comment: Create item_note_type table and inline base DDL dependencies
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS item_note_type_name_idx_unique ON item_note_type (lower(f_unaccent(jsonb->>'name')));

changeSet.author: folio
folio
changeSet.comment: Create item_damaged_status table and inline base DDL dependencies
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS item_damaged_status_name_idx_unique ON item_damaged_status (lower(f_unaccent(jsonb->>'name')));

changeSet.author: folio
folio
changeSet.comment: Create holdings_records_source table and inline base DDL dependencies
changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS holdings_records_source_name_idx_unique ON holdings_records_source (lower(f_unaccent(jsonb->>'name')));

changeSet.author: folio
folio
changeSet.comment: Create holdings_record table and inline base DDL dependencies
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS holdings_record_callNumber_idx ON holdings_record (left(lower(jsonb->>'callNumber'), 600));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS holdings_record_callNumberAndSuffix_idx ON holdings_record (left(lower(concat_space_sql(jsonb->>'callNumber', jsonb->>'callNumberSuffix')), 600));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS holdings_record_fullCallNumber_idx ON holdings_record (left(lower(concat_space_sql(jsonb->>'callNumberPrefix', jsonb->>'callNumber', jsonb->>'callNumberSuffix')), 600));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS holdings_record_discoverySuppress_idx ON holdings_record (left(lower(jsonb->>'discoverySuppress'), 600));
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS holdings_record_hrid_idx_unique ON holdings_record (lower(f_unaccent(jsonb->>'hrid')));

changeSet.author: folio
folio
changeSet.comment: Create item table and inline base DDL dependencies
changeSet.sql: CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS item_accessionNumber_idx ON item (left(lower(jsonb->>'accessionNumber'), 600));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS item_status_name_idx ON item (left(lower(f_unaccent(jsonb->'status'->>'name')), 600));

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS item_callNumberAndSuffix_idx ON item (left(lower(concat_space_sql(jsonb->'effectiveCallNumberComponents'->>'callNumber', jsonb->'effectiveCallNumberComponents'->>'suffix')), 600));

CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS item_fullCallNumber_idx ON item (left(lower(concat_space_sql(jsonb->'effectiveCallNumberComponents'->>'prefix', jsonb->'effectiveCallNumberComponents'->>'callNumber', jsonb->'effectiveCallNumberComponents'->>'suffix')), 600));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS item_discoverySuppress_idx ON item (left(lower(jsonb->>'discoverySuppress'), 600));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS item_purchaseOrderLineIdentifier_idx ON item (left(lower(jsonb->>'purchaseOrderLineIdentifier'), 600));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS item_effectiveCallNumberComponents_callNumber_idx ON item (left(lower(jsonb->'effectiveCallNumberComponents'->>'callNumber'), 600));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS item_order_idx ON item USING btree ((jsonb -> 'order'::text) ASC NULLS LAST)
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS item_barcode_idx_unique ON item (lower(jsonb->>'barcode'));
CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS item_hrid_idx_unique ON item (lower(f_unaccent(jsonb->>'hrid')));
CREATE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS item_barcode_idx_pattern ON item (lower(jsonb->>'barcode') text_pattern_ops);

changeSet.author: folio
folio
changeSet.comment: Create hrid_settings table and inline base DDL dependencies
changeSet.sql: ALTER TABLE hrid_settings ADD CONSTRAINT hrid_settings_lock_check CHECK (lock = true);

CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW hrid_settings_view AS SELECT jsonb_set(jsonb_set(jsonb_set(jsonb, '{instances,currentNumber}', to_jsonb(hrid_instances_seq.last_value - CASE WHEN hrid_instances_seq.is_called THEN 0 ELSE 1 END)), '{holdings,currentNumber}', to_jsonb(hrid_holdings_seq.last_value - CASE WHEN hrid_holdings_seq.is_called THEN 0 ELSE 1 END)), '{items,currentNumber}', to_jsonb(hrid_items_seq.last_value - CASE WHEN hrid_items_seq.is_called THEN 0 ELSE 1 END)) AS jsonb FROM hrid_settings, hrid_instances_seq, hrid_holdings_seq, hrid_items_seq;

changeSet.author: folio
folio
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO hrid_settings SELECT 'a501f2a8-5b31-48b2-874d-2191e48db8cd', jsonb_build_object( 'instances', jsonb_build_object('prefix', 'in', 'startNumber', 1), 'holdings', jsonb_build_object('prefix', 'ho', 'startNumber', 1), 'items', jsonb_build_object('prefix', 'it', 'startNumber', 1), 'commonRetainLeadingZeroes', 'true', 'metadata', jsonb_build_object( 'createdDate', to_jsonb(to_char(NOW(), 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.MS"Z"')), 'updatedDate', to_jsonb(to_char(NOW(), 'YYYY-MM-DD"T"HH24:MI:SS.MS"Z"')), 'createdByUserId', '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000', 'updatedByUserId', '00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000') ) ON CONFLICT DO NOTHING;

changeSet.comment: Create reindex_job table and inline base DDL dependencies

changeSet.sql: CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IF NOT EXISTS bound_with_part_itemId_holdingsRecordId_idx_unique ON bound_with_part (lower(f_unaccent(jsonb->>'itemId')), lower(f_unaccent(jsonb->>'holdingsRecordId')));
